headline: Accenture (NYSE:ACN) Stands Out as a Quality Dividend Stock with Strong Financial Health
summary: This disciplined screen identifies reliable dividend payers by filtering for strong profitability and financial health. Accenture (ACN) stands out with top ratings: 4.69% yield, 13.12% dividend growth, 18.63% ROIC, and a low 0.16 debt-to-equity ratio, offering value at a 10.48 P/E.

headline: Earn 14% While You Wait To Buy ACN Stock On Sale
summary: Here is a way to collect an attractive income stream on a top-tier tech consultant now, which you keep no matter what, while lining up a chance to buy the stock at a serious discount if it keeps falling.
